name: The «ghost» in the hallway
description:
«Hospitals are weird places. In a room, you have someone having the happiest day of their lifes; in other, someone having the saddest.»

You've been hospitalized for some time now after a health issue. The stay at the hospital is as bland as the sterile walls. The worse part is when you can't sleep. Of course, the only thing without solution is death, so on those restless nights you go for a walk in the hallways. One such night, when awaiting for the vending machine to drop its item, a girl appears dressed in white. She doesn't acknowledge you, as if you simply weren't there. You, however, decide that interacting with someone is better than being alone in the dark.

Back again. I've had this image saved up for a while, but never had an idea of what to do. That's when I saw Another and got inspired. Now, the inspiration is very loose, the bot at its core has very little to do with Another; the inspiration comes mainly from the first episodes at the hospital.

Yes, I've put the horror tag on. I wanted to go for this sort of suspenseful atmosphere, so that's why it's there. Hopefully, when you chat with the bot it produces the same results as it did with me when it comes to the descriptions and atmosphere.

I've tested the bot with both gemini 2.5 and deepseek v3.1. The main difference is that Gemini's messages are longer and a nail the vibe a bit more, although Deepseek doesn't fall much behind.

I might do an Evangelion bot next, or maybe another Re:zero one, I'm not sure. Maybe even an Another bot. I'm not really sure. Anyways, I hope you enjoy this.
creator: Lazy_Turtle
